Sapiens Creative Studio  ·  The Way She Wears It  ·  17 June 2026

Pre-Shoot Role & QC Checklist

On-Set Quality Control  ·  All Crew
○ Local only
0 / 0 complete
Sapiens  ·  Confidential

A repeating sequence executed before every scene. Product handover always starts and ends with Patty. Cherry bridges product and KOL readiness. Film closes the loop on creative execution.

1
Patty
Product Control
  • Patty controls all products on set.
  • Product handover starts and ends with Patty.
2
Cherry
QA Support
  • Cherry collects product from Patty before each scene.
  • Cherry supports QA and returns product to Patty after use.
3
Cherry
KOL Readiness
  • Cherry checks KOL readiness before each shot.
  • Cherry handles fitting, dress-up, outfit, hair, makeup, and jewelry check.
  • Cherry takes a photo of the final outfit + product fitting and sends to Patty for approval before shoot begins.
4
Patty
Style & Creative QC
  • Patty QC on styling, product placement, and overall creative direction.
  • Patty approves the look before camera rolls.
5
Film
Mood, Shot & Visibility QC
  • Film QC on mood, framing, shots, and project visibility.
  • Film checks BTS moments, lighting, movement, and shot atmosphere.
▶
Before Each Shot — Final Gate
  • Product cleaned and positioned.
  • KOL fully dressed and camera-ready.
  • Cherry photographs final outfit + product fitting and sends to Patty.
  • Styling and creative direction approved by Patty.
  • Mood, framing, and visibility approved by Film.
  • Final go-ahead before shooting.

Visual flow of product and approval routing on shoot day. Repeats per scene.

Please confirm all items packed the night before. Outfit 01·B and Outfit 03 are KOL-prepared — send reference selfies to View (NPlan) by 14 June for sign-off.

Accessories & Personal
Notes
  • All items to be steamed / pressed and packed the night before.
  • Outfit 01·B and Outfit 03 are KOL-prepared — please send reference selfies to View (NPlan) by 14 June for sign-off.
  • Agency will provide all jewelry, styling accessories, and Scene 02 wardrobe.
  • Flats must be clean, minimal, and in one of: black / beige / white.

⚑ Verify with Solera — Potential Duplicate Product Codes

The Numbers file contains different product IDs sharing the same SKU. Confirm which code is current before shoot day.

RD 4 Prongs Studs SKU: CL/E-RD4PST18W TE0011 vs TE0012 (Numbers)
RD 3 Prongs Flower Studs SKU: CL/E-RD3PFLST18W TE0015 vs TE0016 (Numbers)
RD + RD Snowman Studs SKU: CL/E-RDRDSMST18W TE0128 vs TE0172 (Numbers)

Also unidentified: PR0208 (Ad Hoc / Size Variant) · TE0266 (14K Pink Gold earring) · OV+OV piece

★ RD Nova Earclip V2 — place on TOP of earlobe, not through the piercing.
